title: System and method for image analysis based security system
abstract: A system and method for determining an object is disclosed. A security appliance, with a processor and memory is provided. The security appliance is configured to receive image of an object captured by a security device. The security device located in a first location. The security device also receives image of another object captured by another security device. The another security device located in a second location. The image of the object is processed to generate a first plurality of attributes for the object. The image of the another object is processed to generate a second plurality of attributes for the another object. The first plurality of attributes for the object and the second plurality of attributes for the another object are compared and based on the comparison, determine that the object and the another object are the same.
claims: Claims What is Claimed is: 1. A method for determining an object, comprising: providing a security appliance, with a processor and memory, the security appliance configured to: receiving image of an object by the security appliance, the image of the object captured by a security device, the security device located in a first location; receiving image of another object by the security appliance, the image of the another object captured by another security device, the another security device located in a second location; processing the image of the object to generate a first plurality of attributes for the object; processing the image of the another object to generate a second plurality of attributes for the another object; and comparing the first plurality of attributes for the object and the second plurality of attributes for the another object and determining that the object and the another object are the same based on the comparison. 2. The method of Claim 1, further including concluding the object moved between the first location and the second location. 3. The method of Claim 1, wherein upon detection of the object by the security device, activating the another security device to capture an image. 4. The method of Claim 1, wherein the first location and the second location are located in a defined neighborhood. 5. The method of Claim 4, wherein a plurality of security devices are deployed at different locations within the defined neighborhood, the security appliance configured to receive images of a plurality of objects captured by each of the plurality of security devices for analysis. 6. The method of Claim 5, further including, determining that at least one of the plurality of objects captured by at least two of the plurality of security devices are same. 7. The method of Claim 5, further including generating a list of objects detected in the neighborhood and identifying one or more of the objects in the list as associated with the neighborhood. 8. A system to determine an object, comprising: a security appliance, with a processor and memory, the security appliance configured to receive image of an object, the image of the object captured by a security device, the security device located in a first location; receive image of another object, the image of the another object captured by another security device, the another security device located in a second location; process the image of the object to generate a first plurality of attributes for the object; process the image of the another object to generate a second plurality of attributes for the another object; and compare the first plurality of attributes for the object and the second plurality of attributes for the another object and determine that the object and the another object are the same based on the comparison. 9. The system of Claim 8, further including concluding the object moved between the first location and the second location. 10. The system of Claim 8, wherein upon detection of the object by the security device, the another security device is activated to capture an image. 11. The system of Claim 8, wherein the first location and the second location are located in a defined neighborhood. 12. The system of Claim 11, wherein a plurality of security devices are deployed at different locations within the defined neighborhood, the security appliance configured to receive images of a plurality of objects captured by each of the plurality of security devices for analysis. 13. The system of Claim 12, wherein the security appliance determines that at least one of the plurality of objects captured by at least two of the plurality of security devices are same. 14. The system of Claim 12, wherein a list of objects detected in the neighborhood is generated and one or more of the objects in the list are identified as associated with the neighborhood.
